case_title: JOSEPH ABGI VS. AMERICAN EXPRESS COMPANY

docket_entries.description: REMARK: ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED: ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY ABGI, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN EXPRESS COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
